_note: Capability slot definitions for Ora's image / video / training pipeline. Authored 2026-04-29 under WP-7.0.1. Each entry is the canonical contract a model registers against; provider wiring lands in WP-7.3.2 / WP-7.3.3 / WP-7.3.4.

image_generates.name: image_generates
image_generates.summary: Generate a new image from a text description.

required_inputs.name: prompt
required_inputs.description: Natural-language description of the image to generate.

optional_inputs.name: style
optional_inputs.description: Style hint appended to the prompt (e.g., 'watercolor', 'photorealistic').

optional_inputs.name: provider_override
optional_inputs.description: Force a specific provider for this call instead of routing-config preferred.

output.description: Image bytes; inserted into canvas at default location or selected anchor.

common_errors.description: No provider configured for this slot.
common_errors.fix_path: Configure a provider via Framework — API Key Acquisition.md

common_errors.description: Provider's content policy blocked the prompt.

image_edits.name: image_edits
image_edits.summary: Modify a region of an existing image (inpaint).

required_inputs.name: image
required_inputs.description: Canvas object id of the image to edit.

required_inputs.name: mask
required_inputs.description: Mask defining the region to modify.

required_inputs.name: prompt
required_inputs.description: Description of what should appear in the masked region.

optional_inputs.name: strength
optional_inputs.description: How aggressively to apply the edit. 0.0 = no change, 1.0 = full replacement.

optional_inputs.name: provider_override
optional_inputs.description: Force a specific provider for this call.

output.description: Image bytes; replaces source or lands as new layer per user setting.

common_errors.fix_path: Draw a mask first (per §7.5 selection model).
Select an image on the canvas.

common_errors.description: Mask doesn't overlap the source image.

image_outpaints.name: image_outpaints
image_outpaints.summary: Extend an image beyond its current borders.

required_inputs.name: image
required_inputs.description: Canvas object id of the image to extend.

required_inputs.name: prompt
required_inputs.description: Description of what should appear in the new region.

common_errors.fix_path: Use the valid set: top / bottom / left / right.

required_inputs.name: image
required_inputs.description: Canvas object id of the image to upscale.

optional_inputs.name: provider_override
optional_inputs.description: Force a specific provider for this call.

output.description: Image bytes; replaces source at higher resolution.

common_errors.description: Input × scale_factor exceeds provider's max output.

image_styles.name: image_styles
image_styles.summary: Apply a style from a reference image (or trained style adapter) to a source image.

required_inputs.name: source_image
required_inputs.description: Canvas object id of the image to restyle.

required_inputs.name: style_reference
required_inputs.description: Canvas object id of the style image OR a trained style-adapter id.

output.description: Image bytes; new image (does not replace source).

common_errors.description: Source and style differ in a way the model can't reconcile.

image_varies.name: image_varies
image_varies.summary: Generate variations of a source image.

required_inputs.name: source_image
required_inputs.description: Canvas object id of the image to vary.

optional_inputs.name: variation_strength
optional_inputs.description: How far each variation diverges from the source.

output.description: Multiple images; rendered as a grid in a result panel.

common_errors.description: Model can't determine what aspects of the source to vary.

image_to_prompt.name: image_to_prompt
image_to_prompt.summary: Generate a text prompt that would produce a similar image.

required_inputs.name: image
required_inputs.description: Canvas object id of the image to reverse-engineer.

optional_inputs.name: target_style
optional_inputs.description: Target prompt style for downstream copy-paste.

required_inputs.name: image
required_inputs.description: Canvas object id of the image to critique.

optional_inputs.name: genre
optional_inputs.description: Inferred or supplied genre to anchor the critique.

common_errors.description: No rubric supplied and no inferable genre.

video_generates.name: video_generates
video_generates.summary: Generate a video from a text description.

required_inputs.name: prompt
required_inputs.description: Natural-language description of the video to generate.

output.description: Video bytes; lands as new entry in chat output stream when ready.

style_trains.name: style_trains
style_trains.summary: Train a style adapter / LoRA from reference images.

required_inputs.name: reference_images
required_inputs.description: At least 3 images that exemplify the target style.

required_inputs.name: name
required_inputs.description: Display name for the trained style adapter.

output.description: Identifier of the new style adapter; registered for use in image_styles.

common_errors.fix_path: Try with different references or a different provider.
